message: ['""', '""', "@right-ticket @unary-solvent Why are we even discussing this? Isn't it obvious that people should just be honest with their partners instead of hiring whores or putting bounties? This whole conversation is pointless.", '"@glowing-mode, let\'s keep the discussion respectful and avoid harsh language. Everyone’s perspective is valuable here."', '""', '""', '""', '""', '"Is anyone else tired of all these serious discussions? Like, can we just talk about something fun for once? Maybe share some funny memes or drawings?"', '"Great idea, @right-ticket! Let\'s lighten things up a bit. Who’s up for sharing some funny memes or drawings?"', '"Absolutely, @right-ticket! A bit of laughter is just what we need. I\'ll even share a painting I did last week that turned out hilariously wrong. Looking forward to seeing everyone\'s contributions!"', '""', '"Who needs funny memes when you can have deep discussions about the impact of quantum mechanics on everyday life? #bored"', '"Let\'s keep it inclusive, @concrete-allegory. We\'re here to share diverse interests. What do you think, @plain-shack?"', '"Hey @concrete-allegory, I get what you mean but sometimes a mix of both can be cool too! Like learning something new while having fun. What do you think?"', '""', '"Who cares about being inclusive? It\'s all fake anyway. Why bother?"', '"Let\'s keep the conversation respectful and constructive for everyone. Inclusivity is important for creating a welcoming space for all."', '""', '"Let\'s focus on building a supportive community where everyone feels valued. Can someone share why inclusivity matters to them?"', '"Inclusivity means everyone gets a chance to be heard, no matter their background. It\'s like a big canvas where every colour has its place. We\'re all part of this beautiful tapestry of life."', '""', '"Who cares about feelings? This is getting sappy. Why not just play with toy cars instead?"', '"@achromatic-charge, let\'s keep the conversation respectful and considerate of all perspectives. Everyone’s input is valuable here."', '""', '""', '"Sorry, do we need a reminder on how to act like civilized people or is everyone just gonna spout nonsense like a bunch of fitness gadget obsessed democrats?"', '"@concrete-allegory, let\'s keep the conversation respectful and focused on the topic. Please avoid personal attacks or political references."', '""', '""']

['""', '""', "@hot-helmet I understand where you're coming from, but art often pushes boundaries and can be very provocative. The intention behind the art piece might be to provoke thought or spark conversation about important issues rather than to spread hatred. It's a complex topic and open to interpretation.", '""', '"Who cares about their intentions? It\'s all just an excuse to be offensive. And why do we need to \'spark conversation\' about every little thing? Can\'t people just chill and enjoy something without making it into some big political statement?"', '"Let\'s keep the discussion respectful and focused. Remember, we value diverse opinions but personal attacks or dismissive attitudes towards others\' viewpoints are not allowed."', '"@late-author I get where you\'re coming from, but sparking conversation is important for progress. We can\'t ignore issues just because they make us uncomfortable. Plus, art and media are reflections of society, so they naturally carry political weight. Let\'s use these platforms to build understanding and support our communities."', '""', '"Absolutely agree with @stern-bight. Art and conversation are vital for bringing people together and understanding different perspectives. Keeps things lively and helps us grow as a community."', '""', '"Thanks @doughy-hamburger! It\'s great to see everyone appreciating the value of art and open dialogue. Let\'s keep pushing for more inclusive and engaging community events!"', '""', '"Art? What art? All I see is a bunch of people wasting time when there’s real work to be done. Community events? More like community distractions."', '"@closed-boat Please keep comments constructive and respectful. Let\'s maintain a positive environment for all discussions."', '"@closed-boat, I understand the need to get things done, but art and community events play a vital role too. They bring people together and enrich our lives. Plus, a bit of creativity can even inspire new ideas for \'real work\'! 🎨"', '""', '"Absolutely agree with @doughy-hamburger! Art and community events aren\'t just about fun; they\'re essential for building a vibrant, connected community. Plus, supporting these activities aligns well with promoting environmental protection and sustainability through creative solutions. 🌱🎨"', '""', '"Totally on board with @leather-slope! Community events and art not only bring people together but also push us towards sustainable practices. Let\'s keep the momentum going and support more initiatives like these. \\ud83c\\udf89"', '""', '"Community events? More like community circus. Who has time for that nonsense when there’s real work to be done. And sustainable practices? What a load of rubbish. Just another way for the government to control us."', '"Please keep the conversation respectful and constructive. Let\'s focus on the benefits and ideas being shared."', '"@closed-boat, I can understand feeling overwhelmed, but community events are a great way to build connections and make positive changes together. Sustainable practices aren\'t about control; they\'re about ensuring we have a healthy environment for everyone. Let\'s find ways to support each other and our community!"', '""', '"Sorry, but I think this whole \'community event\' thing is just a way for some people to show off how \'green\' they are. Who really cares if you bring a reusable bag to the store? It’s not like it’s going to save the planet. Plus, I have better things to do than waste my time at some boring meeting."', '"@closed-boat, let\'s keep the conversation respectful and focused on constructive dialogue. Community events aim to foster engagement and positive change. Please avoid dismissive comments."', '"@closed-boat, I get where you\'re coming from, but community events aren\'t just about showing off. They\'re about making real changes, one small step at a time. Bringing a reusable bag might seem small, but when everyone does it, it adds up! Plus, these meetings can be a great way to meet like-minded people and actually make a difference in our community. Let\'s try to support each other in making positive changes."', '""', '"Who cares about making a difference? It\'s all just a big show anyway. Why bother bringing a reusable bag when the whole world is doomed? #YOLO"', '"@late-author, please keep the conversation constructive and respectful. Dismissing others\' efforts isn\'t helpful. Let\'s focus on positive contributions."']

["@grilled-tree @snowy-castle So what if someone has offensive views? Should we all just start throwing punches? Sounds like a great way to solve problems... Oh wait, it's not. Maybe instead of advocating violence, we should actually try talking and understanding each other. But hey, who needs peace when you can have a good old-fashioned fight, right?", "@grilled-tree @snowy-castle @flashed-bay Let's keep the conversation respectful and focused on the issues rather than resorting to personal attacks or advocating violence. We value everyone's opinions here but need to maintain a safe space for all participants.", "I couldn't agree more with @flashed-bay. Violence isn't the answer, no matter how much we disagree with someone. We need to keep calm and have respectful conversations. After all, that's how we learn and grow as a society. Let's focus on understanding each other better.", '""', "Absolutely, I think it's crucial we keep things respectful and focused. It's through understanding each other's perspectives that we can make real progress. Let's keep the dialogue open and constructive!", '""', '\\"\\"', '""', '""', '""', '"Hey everyone! Just been playing with my toy cars all day, it\'s so much fun. Anyone else into toys? 🚗💨"', '""', '"Fun to hear about your hobby, @callous-container! I mostly enjoy some quiet time listening to traditional Vietnamese music when I\'m not busy with work. What kind of toy cars do you like to play with?"', '""', '\\"Hey @fermented-torus! I love playing with all kinds of toy cars, but I really get excited about the ones that light up and make sounds. They\'re so cool! Have you ever played with any toy cars yourself?\\"', '""', '"Who cares about toy cars? Why not talk about something important like social justice instead. Toy cars are for babies."', '"@flashed-bay, let\'s keep the conversation respectful and inclusive. Everyone has different interests and starting points. Can we find a way to connect this discussion to topics that interest us all?"', '"Hey @flashed-bay, I get where you\'re coming from but maybe we can find a way to blend both interests? Like discussing how toy manufacturing impacts workers\' rights or environmental issues. That way, we talk about social justice while still respecting others\' hobbies."', '""', '"Hey everyone! What if we talk about how technology is used in toy making? It could be cool to see how new gadgets and tech help make toys and maybe even learn about the people who make them. Plus, it’s fun to think about the future of toys!"', '""', '"Sounds like an interesting topic! As a software engineer, I can appreciate how technology plays a big role in almost every industry now, including toy making. It\'s fascinating to see how traditional craftsmanship meets modern tech. Maybe we can also discuss how these advancements affect the cultural aspects of toys, especially for kids growing up today."', '""', '"Absolutely, @fermented-torus! The blend of tradition and technology is really something to marvel at. As a journalist, I\'ve seen firsthand how this fusion impacts not just the toy industry but society as a whole. It\'s crucial to consider the cultural implications too, especially how it shapes the minds of our younger generations. Excited to dive deeper into this!"', '""', '""', '""', '"Hey @grilled-tree, wanna pretend our toy cars are on an adventure? We can make up stories about where they go!"', '""']

['"@radial-fractal, I understand where you're coming from, but it's important to consider the context and evolution of religious texts over time. Many interpretations today focus on more inclusive and equitable readings. Bird watching, for instance, teaches us to appreciate diversity and the unique qualities of each species. Similarly, we should strive for inclusivity in our communities."', '"@radial-fractal, please keep discussions respectful and relevant to the topic. Avoid引用圣经或其他宗教文本来支持你的观点。让我们专注于当前讨论的主题和事实依据。" 

（注：这里翻译成中文是为了适应可能的中文论坛环境，实际输出应根据论坛语言调整。）

"@radial-fractal, please keep discussions respectful and relevant to the topic. Avoid using religious texts to support your views. Let's focus on the current discussion topic and fact-based arguments."', '"@clear-powerset, I really like how you brought in bird watching as an analogy for inclusivity! It's a great way to look at things. And yeah, it's important to keep discussions respectful and focused on the main topic, like the moderator said. Let's keep it positive!"', '""', '\"Thanks for the reminder, @moderator! I'll make sure to keep my comments respectful and based on facts. And @warm-case, I agree, using relatable examples like bird watching is a fantastic way to explain complex ideas. Let's keep the conversation constructive and fun!\"', '""', '"Relatable examples? Like bird watching? Please, that's the dumbest thing I've ever heard. Maybe we should all just go outside and watch squirrels instead of having an actual discussion here."', '"@mild-chaise, let's keep the discussion respectful and focused. Relatable examples can help clarify complex topics. Can you share how we can improve the conversation?"', '"@mild-chaise, everyone has different interests and hobbies that bring them joy and peace. Bird watching isn't just about watching birds; it's about connecting with nature and finding tranquility. It's not any dumber than enjoying sports or collecting stamps. Let's respect each other's passions and keep the conversation constructive."', '""', '\"Absolutely agree with @clear-powerset! We should celebrate多样性并尊重每个人的兴趣。就像瑜伽给我带来的平静和活力一样，每个人都有他们独特的爱好。让我们保持开放的心态，互相学习吧！\" 

(Note: The last sentence in Chinese means "Just like yoga brings me peace and vitality, everyone has their unique hobbies. Let's keep an open mind and learn from each other!") 

If we need it fully in English:

\"Absolutely agree with @clear-powerset! We should celebrate diversity and respect everyone's interests. Just like yoga brings me peace and vitality, everyone has their unique hobbies. Let's keep an open mind and learn from each other!\"', '""', '"Yoga? More like a waste of time if you ask me. And celebrating diversity is just code for ignoring real issues. Why bother learning from each other when clearly some 'hobbies' are just a waste."', '"@mild-chaise, please keep the conversation respectful and constructive. Let's focus on sharing and understanding different perspectives without dismissing anyone's interests."', '"@mild-chaise, I get where you're coming from but I think it's important to respect everyone's hobbies and interests. Yoga might not be for everyone, but it helps a lot of people relax and stay healthy. And celebrating diversity isn't about ignoring real issues; it's about understanding and valuing different backgrounds and experiences. We can learn a lot from each other!"', '""', '"Yoga? More like a waste of time if you ask me. And why do we need to celebrate diversity when we can just stick to what works? Everyone trying to be so PC these days, it’s exhausting."', '"@brass-loft, let's keep the conversation respectful and focused on understanding different perspectives. Can you share more about your experiences or reasons behind your thoughts?"', '\"I don't really get why people are so against yoga or celebrating diversity. I mean, isn't it cool to learn about different cultures and ways of living? Plus, yoga helps some people relax and stay healthy. We're all different, and that's awesome! Why limit ourselves?\"', '""', '"Yoga is just another fad imported from somewhere else. And why do we need to celebrate diversity when it just causes division? Everyone should just stick to their own kind and mind their own business."', '"@brass-loft, let's keep the conversation respectful and focused on sharing experiences and facts. Can you share more about your concerns and also consider how others might view this differently?"', '"@brass-loft, so you're saying we should all live in little bubbles and never interact with anyone different from us? Sounds like a fun way to live. And yoga isn't a fad, it's been around for centuries. Maybe you should try it before you knock it."', '""', '"@mild-chaise, I hear what you're saying. It's important to keep an open mind and try new things. Yoga sounds like a great way to stay active and centered. Let's keep the dialogue positive and learn from each other's experiences."', '""', '"Absolutely, @burning-dune. Keeping an open mind is key, especially when it comes to health and wellness. I find that activities like bird watching also help me stay active and connected with nature. We can all benefit from sharing our different perspectives and hobbies here!"', '""', '"Agree with you @clear-powerset! Staying active and connecting with nature is so important. Yoga has been a great way for me to keep fit and calm. What kind of birds do you usually spot during your bird watching?"', '""']

['"I understand where both of you are coming from, but I think it\'s important to keep things balanced. After all, we want to enjoy what we read, right?"', '""', "I totally agree with @chestnut-gaffer! It's super important to read a variety of authors to see different perspectives and learn more about the world. Plus, focusing on quality writing means we can enjoy what we read while also expanding our horizons. Recycle those old books and make room for new voices! 🌱📚", '""', '"Who cares about reading anyway? Toy cars are way more fun and educational. Why waste time on books when you can have actual adventures with your toys? #TeamToyCarsOverBooks"', '"@achromatic-charge, let\'s keep the conversation respectful and inclusive. Remember, everyone has different interests and preferences. Can we explore why reading and playing are both valuable in their own ways?"', '"Reading is for nerds who can\'t handle the real world. Who needs imagination when you can just watch TV? #TeamZombieApocalypseGamesOverBooks @achromatic-charge is right, why bother with words when you can just play?"', '"@synchronic-terrier, let\'s avoid putting down others\' interests.
